item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 7min Gian van Veen & Michael van Gerwen headline on home soil tomorrow!
Don't forget to play
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 7min Gian van Veen & Michael van Gerwen headline on home soil tomorrow!
Don't forget to play our FREE predictor game ahead of Night 11 of the BetMGM Premier League, for your chance to win some great prizes!
Play here http:// bit.ly/PDCGames 2 1 8 2 mil

item.title: ProSnookerBlog: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 22min I also asked him for a Diet Coke in jest but he came through Cita David Roe @davidroe147 ·
item.description: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 22min I also asked him for a Diet Coke in jest but he came through Cita David Roe @davidroe147 · 2h Asking Liam Pullen to stop practicing and go and make me a coffee at Landywood SC last week seems to have done no harm. #Crucible 4 299

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 29min They're going to have to stick some more seats in the EIS while they're sorting the Cruci
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 29min They're going to have to stick some more seats in the EIS while they're sorting the Crucible.
Great that so many people go to the Judgement Days. Two of the best days of snooker of the season. Cita snookeroland @Rolmeister147 · 45min Got one of the last available seats. Mental in here 15 526

item.title: PDCEurope: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 38min Wessel Nijman makes it 4! He secures his 4th ranking title of the year! 3 198
item.description: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 38min Wessel Nijman makes it 4! He secures his 4th ranking title of the year! 3 198
